g.text: Go ask the bees for honey.
Go pick red berries at the bramble.
Go find the big red ball.
Go fetch the bright paper kite.
Go wake sleepy Owl in the oak.
Go find the little music box.
Ask the bees nicely and wait.
Carry the honey back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.
Stretch for the wobbly high ones.
Carry the berries back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.
Roll the ball back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.
Carry the kite gently under her arm.
Let the kite flap open in the wind.
Bring the kite back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.
Hoot softly to wake Owl gently.
Walk Owl back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.
Give the handle a big fast wind.
Carry the music box back to the blanket.
Ring the bell and start the picnic.
Lay out all the picnic treats.
Sing the teddy bears' picnic song.
Wind up the music box and sway.
Curl up for a cozy nap in the sun.
Roll the big red ball around the ring.
Fly the bright kite in the breeze.
